biological_replicate: Blood samples with high D-dimer levels were collected from five recruited patients.
experimental_design: snFPITE vs rtPA vs saline comparison
In a study using rats with FeCl3-induced common carotid arterial thrombosis...
factor_value: both snFPITE and rtPA significantly improved the carotid arterial blood flow compared with the negative saline group.
